name: Lacuna Codex Usage
author: Lacuna
description: Lacuna-styled top-bar widget for Codex weekly usage.

barWidget.description: Shows remaining Codex weekly usage from local Codex session data.

schema.label: Refresh interval (ms)
schema.description: How often to recalculate local weekly usage.

schema.label: Show usage meter
schema.description: Draw a small used-percent meter inside the widget, opposite the flyout-open indicator.

schema.label: Cycle weekly usage
schema.description: Rotate the bar label between the 5-hour window and the weekly window.

schema.label: Cycle interval (ms)
schema.description: How long each readout (5h / weekly) stays before rolling to the other.

schema.label: Display mode
schema.description: Use full text, or a compact percent-only label.

schema.label: Color profile
schema.description: Override the global Lacuna color profile for this widget.
